form.formComment: Racing well. Last start favourite; came from midfield and won by 2.5 len Nantes on March 31 over 3800m slow going defeating Bauloise De La Noe with 67kg at $1.60 in a steeplechase. Race before finished fourth of 7 runners at Pau in the LR on February 8 over 3500m, on a wet track; 27 len behind Callisto Du Nord with 68kg at $8.70. Promising galloper. Could prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Recent form impressive for this race. form.formComment: Comes off a 49 day let-up. Last outing finished sixth of 12 runners at this track in the LR on February 23 over 3600m, on heavy track; 35 len behind Boystone with 64.5kg at $12.
